response:
お寺で死者の戒名や死亡した日などを記入しておく過去帳の別名で人が死んだとき「これに入る」といわれるものは「霊名帳」です  
theory is important when considering the origins of such records  
theory helps explain how these documents have been used throughout history  
theory also supports the idea that the term is deeply rooted in traditional Buddhist practices  
theory can be applied to understand the cultural significance of this practice
